commands.command: this pr has been broadened from policy-only to a complete fix for #79210. re-review please. each of your three [p2] concerns is addressed in commit `47ca5004b9`: 1. **stream wrapper strips reasoning fields (`extensions/xai/stream.ts:173-175`)** — now conditional on `model.reasoning`. reasoning-capable grok routes (`grok-4.x`, `grok-4-1-fast-reasoning`, `grok-4.20-*-reasoning`, etc.) pass `reasoning` / `reasoningeffort` / `reasoning_effort` through to xai. non-reasoning routes still strip them, preserving the safety from the prior off-only changelog entries that prevented `invalid reasoning effort` failures on plain grok routes. 2. **runtime compat maps every level to null (`extensions/xai/runtime-model-compat.ts:10`)** — replaced with a context-aware map. reasoning-capable models now map `low|medium|high → "low"|"medium"|"high"` (and `minimal|xhigh` clamp to `"low"|"high"` per xai's accepted values), with `off` correctly omitting the field. non-reasoning xai models keep the all-`null` map. dedicated coverage in the new `extensions/xai/runtime-model-compat.test.ts`. 3. **real behavior proof (screenshots only showed the menu surface)** — replaced with the actual outbound request body at every `/think` level for both a reasoning-capable model (`xai/grok-4.3`) and a non-reasoning model (`xai/grok-3-mini`), captured deterministically from the live `createxaitoolpayloadcompatibilitywrapper` + `applyxairuntimemodelcompat` chain piped into pi-ai's actual openai-responses / openai-completions builders. output is embedded in the pr description. the `/think low|medium|high` cases on `xai/grok-4.3` now carry `reasoning: { effort: "<level>", summary: "auto" }` plus `include: ["reasoning.encrypted_content"]`; `/think off` and every level on the non-reasoning model correctly emit nothing. the same forwarding behavior is locked in by `extensions/xai/stream.test.ts::"forwards native xai responses reasoning effort to pi-ai payload builders"`, which asserts the actual outbound payload via the real pi-ai builder rather than a mock — so this can't quietly regress. **test gates:** `pnpm exec vitest run extensions/xai` is 137/137 green. `pnpm tsgo:extensions:test` is clean. the `pnpm tsgo:core:test` failure on `src/gateway/server.node-pairing-authz.test.ts:144` is pre-existing on `main` and unrelated to xai — same job was already red on this pr before any of these changes. **note for maintainers:** the pr's `mergeable_state` is `dirty` against `main`. that's a pre-existing condition from the fork base being significantly behind upstream, not introduced by this commit; it'll need a rebase or a fresh-fork re-open before merge.
